protocol_notes: Spent approximately $7000 experimenting with various peptides to discover what works and what doesn't. Paid a nurse practitioner $600/month for loading dose of Semaglutide initially. Used Hunter's Cheat Sheet as starting reference for dosing protocols. Learned to load pens. User believes high cost and gray market allure is due to peptides not being readily available through conventional channels. Now has clear arsenal of effective compounds and helps others.
